name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing a quick word?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We hope the visit felt calm, easy, and maybe even a little less scary than you expected — that's always the goal.

If you have 30 seconds, would you mind leaving us a quick review? Honest feedback from patients like you is how other nervous folks find us and decide to finally book that appointment they've been putting off:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't sit right during your visit, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear it from you directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again,
The Bright Smile team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick follow-up: if you have 30 seconds, a short review really helps us out. No pressure! https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
